title: The Capability Frontier: Benchmarks Miss 82% of Model Performance
abstract: arXiv:2606.26836v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Existing benchmarks typically report accuracy for a single model on a single run. This systematically understates real-world LLM capabilities, particularly under heterogeneous data distributions: (i) different models get different questions correct according to their specializations, and (ii) given a budget, multiple generations can be sampled and selectively retained. To quantify this gap, we introduce the Capability Frontier: a Pareto frontier over a set of models that characterizes the best achievable performance at each cost level under optimal selection across models and generations (i.e., via an oracle). Our construction corrects for two opposing biases: underestimation from single-model evaluation and overestimation from taking maxima over noisy samples. We study 21 LLMs across 16 widely used benchmarks spanning coding, reasoning, medicine, factuality, instruction following, and agentic tasks, comparing Capability Frontier perform

Abstract: arXiv:2606.26836v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Existing benchmarks typically report accuracy for a single model on a single run. This systematically understates real-world LLM capabilities, particularly under heterogeneous data distributions: (i) different models get different questions correct according to their specializations, and (ii) given a budget, multiple generations can be sampled and selectively retained. Our construction corrects for two opposing biases: underestimation from single-model evaluation and overestimation from taking maxima over noisy samples. translated_title: 能力前沿：基准测试遗漏了模型82%的性能
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26836v1 公告类型：新 摘要：现有基准测试通常报告单个模型在单次运行中的准确率。这系统地低估了现实世界中的大语言模型能力，尤其是在异构数据分布下：（i）不同模型根据其专长回答不同的问题，（ii）在给定预算下，可以采样并选择性保留多个生成结果。为了量化这一差距，我们引入了能力前沿：一组模型上的帕累托前沿，它描述了在跨模型和跨生成结果的最优选择下（即通过一个预言机），每个成本水平上可达到的最佳性能。我们的构造纠正了两个相反的偏差：单模型评估导致的低估和取噪声样本最大值导致的高估。我们研究了21个大语言模型，涵盖16个广泛使用的基准测试，涉及编码、推理、医学、事实性、指令遵循和智能体任务，比较了能力前沿的性能。
tldr: 现有基准测试因只评估单次运行而低估了LLM能力，本文提出“能力前沿”帕累托曲线，通过最优跨模型与跨生成选择，纠正低估与高估偏差，揭示基准测试遗漏了高达82%的实际性能。
en_tdlr: Existing benchmarks underestimate LLM capabilities by evaluating single runs; this paper introduces the Capability Frontier, a Pareto curve that corrects for underestimation and overestimation biases through optimal selection across models and generations, revealing that benchmarks miss up to 82% of actual performance.
